                                          greater_than: 0
                                        },
                                        allow_blank: true
end

module Api
  module Org
    module V3
      # v3 api endpoints for ap recurring upsells
      class ActionPagesRecurringUpsellsController < BaseController
        before_action :set_upsell, only: %i[show update destroy]

        def index
          authorize %i[api org v3 action_pages_upsells_recurring]

          upsells = @account
                    .action_pages_recurring_upsells
                    .page(page)
                    .per(per_page)

          serialize_collection(upsells)
        end

        def show
          authorize [:api, :org, :v3, @upsell]

          serialize_obj(@upsell)
        end

        def create
          authorize %i[api org v3 action_pages_upsells_recurring]

          upsell = @account
                   .action_pages_recurring_upsells
                   .new(upsell_params)

          if upsell.save
            serialize_obj(upsell, status: :created)
          else
            serialize_errors_for(upsell)
          end
        end

        def update
          authorize [:api, :org, :v3, @upsell]

          if @upsell.update(upsell_params)
            serialize_obj(@upsell)
          else
            serialize_errors_for(@upsell)
          end
        end

      private

        def set_upsell
          @upsell = @account.action_pages_recurring_upsells.find(params[:id])
        end

        def upsell_params
          params.require(params_wrapper).permit(
            *WRAPPED_MODEL_PARAMS.map(&:underscore),
            details: {}
          )
        end

        WRAPPED_MODEL_PARAMS = %w[
          acceptActionQualifier
          acceptActionText
          askPercent
          body
          declineActionQualifier
          declineActionText
          impact
          internalName
          maximumAskAmount
          minimumAskAmount
          roundToNearestMultiple
        ].freeze

        wrap_parameters params_wrapper, include: WRAPPED_MODEL_PARAMS
      end
    end
  end
end

CREATE FUNCTION public.fill_searchable_for_submission() RETURNS trigger
    LANGUAGE plpgsql
    AS $$
        declare
          action_page record;
        begin
          select name,
                 slug,
                 type
          into action_page
          from action_pages
          where id = new.action_page_id;

          new.searchable :=
          setweight(to_tsvector('simple', coalesce(new.id::text, '')), 'A') ||
          setweight(to_tsvector('simple', coalesce(new.first_name, '')), 'A') ||
          setweight(to_tsvector('simple', coalesce(new.last_name, '')), 'A') ||
          setweight(to_tsvector('simple', coalesce(new.email, '')), 'A') ||
          setweight(to_tsvector('simple', coalesce(action_page.name, '')), 'A') ||
          setweight(to_tsvector('simple', coalesce(action_page.slug, '')), 'A') ||
          setweight(to_tsvector('simple', coalesce(action_page.type, '')), 'A');

          return new;
        end
        $$;

# frozen_string_literal: true

# base class for v3 api
class ApiApplicationController < ApplicationController
  rescue_from StandardError,
              ArgumentError,
              NotImplementedError, with: :internal_server_error
  rescue_from ActionController::ParameterMissing, with: :unprocessable_content
  rescue_from Pundit::NotAuthorizedError, with: :forbidden
  rescue_from ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound, with: :not_found

  include Pagination
  include ParamsWrapper
  include Idempotency

  before_action :clean_pagination_params
  before_action :transform_params_keys
  before_action :reject_html_requests

  protect_from_forgery

private

  def serialize_collection(collection, status: :ok, **opts)
    if opts.delete(:without_count)
      collection = collection.without_count
      opts[:meta] ||= {
        previousPage: collection.prev_page,
        currentPage: collection.current_page,
        nextPage: collection.next_page
      }
    else
      opts[:meta] ||= {
        currentPage: collection.current_page,
        totalPages: collection.total_pages,
        totalCount: collection.total_count
      }
    end

    opts[:root] = :data

    serialize(collection, status, opts)
  end

  def serialize_obj(obj, status: :ok, **opts)
    serialize(obj, status, opts)
  end

  def serialize(data, status, opts)
    serializer = serializer_class(opts[:serializer] || self.class)

    render json: serializer.render(data, opts),
           status:
  end

  def serialize_errors_for(obj, status: :unprocessable_content)
    render json: ErrorSerializer.render(obj), status:
  end

  def clean_pagination_params
    request.params.delete_if { |k, v| %w[page per_page].include?(k) && v.blank? }
  end

  def transform_params_keys
    request.params.deep_transform_keys! { |k| k.to_s.underscore }
  end

  def reject_html_requests
    head :not_acceptable if request.format.html?
  end

  def serializer_class(klass)
    return klass if klass.to_s.include?("Serializer")

    Object.const_get(klass.to_s.remove("Controller").singularize << "Serializer")
  end

  def internal_server_error(err)
    Anedot::ExceptionLogger.error(err)
    head :internal_server_error
  end

  def unprocessable_content(err)
    Anedot::ExceptionLogger.warn(err)
    head :unprocessable_content
  end

  def forbidden
    head :forbidden
  end

  def not_found
    head :not_found
  end
end

  def self.transaction(**kwargs, &)
    retried ||= false
    super
  rescue ActiveRecord::PreparedStatementCacheExpired => e
    fail if retried

    Anedot::ExceptionLogger.error(e)
    retried = true
    retry
  end

  def self.filter_by(opts)
    opts = opts.to_h
    opts.compact_blank!

    opts.reduce(all) do |scope, (key, value)|
      scope.public_send("filter_by_#{key}", value)
    end
  end

module Api
  module Org
    module V3
      # v3 api endpoints for upgrade configurations
      class ActionPageUpgradeConfigurationsController < BaseController
        before_action :set_config, only: %i[show update destroy]

        def index
          authorize %i[api org v3 action_page_upgrade_configuration]

          configuration = @account.action_page_upgrade_configurations
                                  .filter_by(filter_params)
                                  .without_temps
                                  .page(page)
                                  .per(per_page)

          serialize_collection(configuration)
        end

        def show
          authorize [:api, :org, :v3, @configuration]

          serialize_obj(@configuration)
        end

        def create
          authorize %i[api org v3 action_page_upgrade_configuration]

          configuration =
            @account.action_page_upgrade_configurations.new(configuration_params)

          if configuration.save
            serialize_obj(configuration, status: :created)
          else
            serialize_errors_for(configuration)
          end
        end

        def update
          authorize [:api, :org, :v3, @configuration]

          if @configuration.update(configuration_update_params)
            serialize_obj(@configuration)
          else
            serialize_errors_for(@configuration)
          end
        end

        def destroy
          authorize [:api, :org, :v3, @configuration]

          return head :method_not_allowed if @configuration.default?

          if @configuration.try_destroy
            head :no_content
          else
            serialize_errors_for(@configuration)
          end
        end

      private

        def filter_params
          params.slice(:q).permit!
        end

        def set_config
          @configuration = @account.action_page_upgrade_configurations.find(params[:id])
        end

        def configuration_update_params
          configuration_params.except(*%i[default])
        end

        def configuration_params
          params.require(params_wrapper).permit(
            *WRAPPED_MODEL_PARAMS.map(&:underscore),
            upgrade_ids: []
          )
        end

        WRAPPED_MODEL_PARAMS = %w[
          actionPagesUpsellsRecurringId
          default
          name
          upgradeIds
        ].freeze

        wrap_parameters params_wrapper, include: WRAPPED_MODEL_PARAMS
      end
    end
  end
end

# Upgrade Workflow
class ActionPageUpgradeConfiguration < ApplicationRecord
  include PgSearch::Model
  include Anedot::ActionPageConfigurationUtils
  include Anedot::ActionPageCacheReset

  self.table_name = "upgrade_configurations"

  has_paper_trail versions: {
    class_name: "PaperTrail::ActionPageUpgradeConfigurationVersion"
  }

  pg_search_scope :search,
                  against: %i[name],
                  using: {
                    tsearch: {
                      dictionary: "english",
                      prefix: true
                    }
                  }

  scope :filter_by_q, -> (q) { search(q).with_pg_search_rank }
  scope :without_temps, -> { where.not("name like ?", "TEMP-%") }

  belongs_to :account
  belongs_to :action_pages_upsells_recurring, optional: true
  has_and_belongs_to_many :upgrades,
                          -> { order("upgrade_configurations_upgrades.created_at") },
                          class_name: "ActionPageUpgrade",
                          foreign_key: :upgrade_configuration_id,
                          association_foreign_key: :upgrade_id

  has_many :action_pages,
           foreign_key: :upgrade_configuration_id,
           dependent: :restrict_with_exception,
           inverse_of: :upgrade_configuration

  before_validation :generate_name_if_null
  before_validation :restrict_name, if: -> (p) { p.default }

  validates :name, presence: true, uniqueness: { scope: :account }
  validates :account_id,
            uniqueness: {
              scope: :default,
              conditions: -> { where(default: true) },
              message: "default already exists"
            }

  # This is a workaround so we can properly order `order_ids` by created_at
  def upgrade_ids=(ids)
    upgrades.clear unless upgrade_ids == ids
    super
  end

private

  def generate_name_if_null
    self.name ||= generate_config_name
  end

  def restrict_name
    self.name = "Default"
  end
end

                                            .per(per_page)

        def show
          authorize [:api, :org, :v3, @action_page]

          serialize_obj(@action_page, view: :object)
        end

        def create
          authorize %i[api org v3 action_page]

          action_page = @account.action_pages.new(create_action_page_params)

          if action_page.save
            if @current_user_scope.default_access_tag
              action_page.access_tags << @current_user_scope.default_access_tag
            end
            serialize_obj(action_page, status: :created, view: :object)
          else
            serialize_errors_for(action_page)
          end
        end

        def update
          authorize [:api, :org, :v3, @action_page]

          if @action_page.update(update_action_page_params)
            serialize_obj(@action_page, view: :object)
          else
            serialize_errors_for(@action_page)
          end
        end

        def bulk_update
          authorize %i[api org v3 action_page]

          action_pages = if params[:all]
                           @account.action_pages
                         else
                           @account.action_pages.where(id: params[:ids])
                         end

          page = action_pages.first
          return head :not_found if page.nil?

          page.assign_attributes(bulk_update_params.merge(account: @account))

          if page.valid?
            action_pages.update_all(bulk_update_params.to_h)
            head :no_content
          else
            serialize_errors_for(page)
          end
        end

        def activate
          authorize [:api, :org, :v3, @action_page]

          if @action_page.active!
            @action_page.update_attribute(:active, true)

            head :no_content
          else
            head :unprocessable_content
          end
        end

        def deactivate
          authorize [:api, :org, :v3, @action_page]

          if @action_page.update(active: false)
            head :no_content
          else
            head :unprocessable_content
          end
        end

        # TODO: deprecated
        def pause
          authorize [:api, :org, :v3, @action_page]

          if @action_page.paused!
            @action_page.update_attribute(:active, false)

            head :no_content
          else
            head :unprocessable_content
          end
        end

        # TODO: deprecated
        def archive
          authorize [:api, :org, :v3, @action_page]

          @action_page.archived!
          @action_page.update_attribute(:active, false)

          head :no_content
        rescue Anedot::Exceptions::ArchiveActionPageError
          head :forbidden
        end

**Analyzing validation and update flow for body length**

This is a thorough investigation into why updates with `body` fields longer than 1100 characters succeed after raising the server's `MAX_BODY_LENGTH` to 2000. I’m considering how the model validation, controller update actions, and serialization of errors interact, noting that 422 errors occur only if the validation fails—that is, for inputs exceeding 2000 characters now. The discrepancy might stem from testing below the new threshold, server caching old constants, or updates routed through paths skipping validation. Highlighting relevant code locations like `app/models/action_pages_upsells_recurring.rb:5,30`, `app/controllers/api/org/v3/action_pages_recurring_upsells_controller.rb:44`, and the test at `spec/models/action_pages_upsells_recurring_spec.rb:39` helps pinpoint where validation enforcement happens and suggests debugging via Rails console to confirm behavior. This way, I can explain the expected validation flow and offer troubleshooting steps if unexpected success persists for inputs over 2000 characters.

payload.message:
Once you bump `MAX_BODY_LENGTH` in `app/models/action_pages_upsells_recurring.rb:5`, the validation at `app/models/action_pages_upsells_recurring.rb:30` now allows any body up to 2 000 characters. That means API calls that used to fail between 1 101–2 000 chars now succeed by design—only payloads strictly over 2 000 should be rejected. The controller path you’re hitting (`app/controllers/api/org/v3/action_pages_recurring_upsells_controller.rb:40`) still calls the model’s `update`, and on failure it renders a 422 via `serialize_errors_for` (`app/controllers/api_application_controller.rb:56`).
